## Project criterion served

<!-- Which quality goal does this PR advance? Check at least one. -->

- [ ] CLI or developer experience

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] CI or build change

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make type-check` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavioral changes
- [ ] Output schema and CLI compatibility reviewed when relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused on one concern
- [ ] User-facing docs updated if needed
- [ ] Changelog entry added if user-visible
- [ ] No unrelated files included
- [ ] Backward compatibility kept for CLI flags, config keys, and JSON output
